title: University of Southampton Delhi Key Information Overview
text: Key information This page contains key information about University of Southampton Delhi, the campus and programmes of study.
summary: This section provides an overview of key information regarding the University of Southampton Delhi, its campus, and study programmes.

title: Academic Calendar Important Dates Overview
text: Important dates in the academic calendar You can find general dates for future academic years here. You will be able to find specific dates related to your program on your timetable after you have enrolled.
summary: General academic calendar dates for future years are provided, with specific programme timetables available post-enrollment.

title: University of Southampton Delhi 2025/2026 Teaching Dates
text: Academic Year 2025/2026 Teaching and Learning datesNew student induction and support week: Starts Monday 25 August 2025Careers and Employer Engagement week: Starts Monday 01 September 2025Term 1 Programme tuition: Starts Monday 08 September 2025Term 1 Assessment Period: Starts Monday 12 January 2026Term 2 Programme tuition: Starts Monday 26 January 2026Term 2 Assessment Period: Starts Monday 18 May 2026
summary: The 2025/2026 academic year includes induction, career engagement, and two terms of programme tuition and assessment periods.

title: University of Southampton Delhi 2025/2026 Vacation Schedule
text: Vacation & Closure datesTerm 1 mid-Semester break: Monday 20 October 2025 to Friday 24 October 2025Christmas vacation: Monday 15 December 2025 to Friday 10 January 2026Term 2 mid-Semester break: Monday 23 March 2026 to Friday 17 April 2026Summer vacation: Monday 08 June 2026 to Friday 14 August 2026
summary: Key vacation periods for the 2025/2026 academic year include mid-semester breaks, Christmas, and summer vacation.

title: University of Southampton Delhi 2026/2027 Teaching Dates
text: Academic Year 2026/2027 Teaching and Learning datesNew student induction and support week: Starts Monday 24 August 2026Careers and Employer Engagement week: Starts Monday 31 August 2026Term 1 Programme tuition: Starts Monday 07 September 2026
summary: The initial teaching and learning dates for the 2026/2027 academic year, including induction and career engagement week, are provided.
